Ром Dictador 100 Months Aged Rum Cafe

name: lor De Caña Centenario 21 Commemorative Edition
Appleton Estate Joy Anniversary 25 Year Old Rum
Dictador XO Insolent
description: Our bold move! Your perfect finish for a meal. Extra old. Blended rum between 25-35 years old. Aged in American Oak ex-bourbon and port casks which have been re-changed in some stages of the aging process.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Dictador XO Insolent Solera System Rum

name: Panamonte Reserva XXV – 25 Year Old Rum
El Dorado 21 Year Old Special Reserve Rum
La Favorite La Flibuste
description: Truly a fantastic choice, this Agricole is known for its sweet taste and unique aroma. It has notes of licorice, spice, sugar cane, oak, and prunes, making it a favorite among rum enthusiasts.

name: Juan Santos 21 Yr Antigua Reserva Rum
El Dorado 12 Year Old Special Reserve Rum
Foursquare 2005 Shibboleth 16-Year
description: Truly a fantastic choice

name: Zafra Master Reserve 30-Year
description: Truly a fantastic choice

name: Ron Zacapa Straight from the Cask Special Edition
description: Ron zacapa 23 years is a magnificent rum, perhaps the best solera I know, but "straight from the cask".... oh man, this is something else! The alcohol is more from the normal edition as I can see from the label. I can see the signature of the master blender, the bottle series number, also the trademark of Zacapa straw bracelet is darker and has better quality from the ordinary. In the snifter glass, I can see the darker color and the full body of the spirit. The first impression is something else from the ordinary confirmed as I give some time to the spirit to bring all the aromas up. I can see in the nose melassa, walnut cream, dried fruits, I feel honey, walnut cream, coffee, banana, cloves, and in the end, my tongue has vanilla ice cream. This is an enormous rum; I tried Ron Zacapa XO, 23, and nothing compares with this treasure! Worth every penny.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Plantation Guatemala Gran Anejo в коробці

name: Appleton Estate Rare Blend 12 Year Old
El Pasador de oro Gran Reserva Rum
description: The rum is a product of Les Bienheureux S.A.S. (in Paris France) and is a blend of several ‘grand reserva’ Guatemala rums with an initial long aging period of 10 to 18 years in several types of casks. The casks are then imported into the Charente, in the cellars of the French company Les Bienheureux where the spirit is rested in used cognac barrels for a further 6 months.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Matusalem Gran Reserva 23 роки в коробці

name: El Dorado 25 Year Old Vintage Reserve Rum
El Pasador de oro XO Rum
Centenario Real
description: Truly a fantastic choice. Smells and tastes of caramel, molasses, oak, vanilla, with just a hint of whiskey/scotch. Not so much to be dominant, but a perfectly light amount. Nicely sweet and wonderfully smooth too!

name: Ron Zacapa 30 Aniversario
description: Truly a fantastic choice

name: Appleton Estate Joy 25-Year
description: Truly a fantastic choice

name: Diplomatico 2000
description: Diplomatico 2000 Single Vintage is a limited edition rum created from one of the best sugar cane harvests Venezuela has experienced to date. It was created by Master Blender Tito Cordero and is the result of a careful selection of reserves, laid to age in the year 2000.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Dictador 20 Years Solera System Rum

name: El Dorado Grand Special Reserve (50th Anniversary) Rum
Rum Nation Jamaica White Pot Still Rum
Rum Nation Jamaica 7 Year Old Cask Strength Pot Still Rum
Dictador XO Perpetual
description: Perpetuating family traditions. A dry, very deeply elegant rum. The favourite rum of Hernan Parra, Dictador Master Blender. Aged in premium quality, ex-bourbon and ex-sherry. Aging time 25-35 years.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Dictador XO Perpetual Solera System Rum

name: Havana Club Selección de Maestros Rum

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Havana Club Seleccion de Maestros в коробці

name: Rum Nation Barbados Anniversary Edition (12 Years Old)
Cubaney Centenario 25-30-Year
description: Truly a fantastic choice.

name: UNHIQ XO
description: Very good rum, perfectly balanced, 42% alcohol. The master blender did a really good job here. This is a work of art, it's perfectly blended. You can keep it in your mouth for a while and it will tell you its story in the language of aromas. The taste is in my imagination red, balanced, sweet, rich and with red fruit aromas (that's because of the sherry finish). Red rubber rings are very dominant and they suggest a very old age of this rum.

name: Bacardi Gran Reserva Diez (10 Years Old)
Penny Blue XO Single Estate Mauritius Rum (Batch #004
Mount Gay 1703 Master Select
description: The 1703 Master Select has a similar taste profile as the 1703 Old Cask. Nice blend of 10 to 30 year old rums with no sweetness factor. At 43% you can detect the alcohol aroma and a bit more burn than standard 40% abv rums. The good news in the flavour profile aspect is that the oak, vanilla, caramel, and some spice (nutmeg comes to mind) are all present and well balanced in this blend.

name: Rum Nation Reunion 7 Year Old Cask Rhum
Opthimus Malt Whisky Finish 25-Year
description: Truly a fantastic choice

name: Foursquare 2008 12-Year
description: Aged Rum from Foursquare with rich flavors of salted caramel, coconut, chocolate, and tropical fruit with a long finish. Known for its complexity and smoothness, this rum is highly regarded among enthusiasts.

name: Diplomatico Ambassador Selection
description: Diplomatico Ambassador Selection is a limited edition rum crafted from 100% still pot rums and aged for a minimum of 12 years. Like its counterparts, the rum originates from Venezuela and is aged in ex-bourbon casks. The rum has a high strength and does not contain any sweeteners, caramel or other additives which means it does not require chill filtration.

name: Quorhum 30-Year
description: Ron Quorhum 30-Year rum is distilled in pot-stills and aged using the solera system for up to 30 years. The rum is produced in the Dominican Republic by Oliver & Oliver.

name: Appleton Estate Reserve 8 Year Old Rum
Appleton Estate 50 Year Old Jamaica Rum – Jamaica Independence Reserve
Penny Blue XO Single Estate Mauritius Rum (Batch #002)
Juan Santos 9 Yr Reserva Especial Rum
Rum Nation Barbados 10 Year Old Rum (2001)
Juan Santos 12 Year Gran Reserva Rum
Centenario 30-Year
description: Centenario 30-Year

name: Diplomatico 2004
description: Diplomatico 2004 is a unique rum with a complex blend of flavors, characterized by a nose of caramel, brown sugar, and fruity notes. It presents a well-balanced profile of sweetness and spice, appealing to rum enthusiasts.

name: Ron Esclavo XO Cask
description: Ron Esclavo XO Cask is an aged rum from the Dominican Republic with an ABV of 40%. Known for its thick, sweet flavor profile with notes of butterscotch, dates, and a slightly smoky flavor. It provides a rich tasting experience that is intense and satisfying.

name: El Dorado 8 Year Old Cask Aged Rum
A.D. Rattray 13 Year Old Trinidad Rum (Caroni Distillery (Cask RR1072))
El Dorado 15 Year Old Special Reserve Rum
El Dorado 3 Year Cask Aged Demerara Rum
Appleton Estate 15 Year Old (Minimum Age) Rum
Old Monk Supreme Rum (Very Old Vatted)
Foursquare 2010 Exceptional Cask Selection XXI 12-Year
description: A rather soft rum, despite the 60%, which can’t disappoint anyone that likes Barbados rum. Rich vanilla, spicy fruit, smooth despite high proof.

name: Richland Classic Reserve Single Barrel Select
El Dorado Deluxe Silver 6 Year Aged Rum
Blue Chair Bay Coconut Spiced Rum
Cane Island Australia Rum (4 Years Old)
Plantation Barbados (Grande reserve) 5 Year old Rum
Old Monk Gold Reserve Rum (12 Years Blended)
Millonario XO
description: Millonario XO is a very sweet but flavorful rum, perhaps just a touch too sweet for some. It presents flavors of bananas, coconut, toffee, spices, with a lovely aroma reminiscent of fresh baked pie or cookies.

name: Diplomatico 2001
description: Diplomatico single vintage rums are one of my all time favorites. I drank the 2000, 2001, and 2002 side by side, and I really struggled to tell them apart. Has an amazing smell of rich butter toffee, caramel, and butterscotch, with a light sherry taste that isn't strong enough to detract from the rum. Taste is an amazing follow up to the nose. Strong at 43%abv, but so good the added strength is perfect. Another amazing rum from Diplomatico.

name: Abuelo Centuria
description: Only the most successful inspirations become legacies; legacies that are cherished and passed down from generation to generation. "Centuria" is our most guarded family treasure. It is the result of patience and passion for the details, embodied in our family's rum-making tradition since 1908. The taste of our legacy.

name: Diplomatico 2002
description: This 2002 version is smoother than the 2001 version. Notes of honey, caramel, vanilla, and exotic fruits. Super sweet, very long finish. It is closer to the vintage 2000. Another very good rum from Diplomatico.

name: Dos Maderas Luxus
description: Dos Maderas PX Luxus rum is produced using rums from Barbados and Guyana. The unique aging process includes an initial 10 years aging in the Caribbean in oak casks. This is followed by an additional 5 years of aging in Spain in casks used to age the sherry Don Guido.

name: Foursquare 2007 Sagacity 12-Year
description: Intense, complex, fruity with notes of ginger, chocolate, pepper, oak, and hints of coconut, tobacco, and vanilla. It has a great nose where the natural sweetness comes through, spicy on the first sip, but sweet and complex flavors develop further.

name: Captain Morgan Jack-O’Blast Pumpkin Spiced Rum
Centenario 25-Year
description: That's some good stuff

name: Diplomatico 2005
description: Smooth as silk. Surprisingly, not very flavoured, it is just it's needed. Not very sweet. Dark chocolate is predominant taste. Smells quite herbal, in my opinion. Aftertaste is long and a little bit spicy.

name: Foursquare 2005 12-Year
description: Number VI in the ECS series 2005 with 59% and a quantity of 12,000. A blend of pot and traditional column distillation. The rum is tropical matured in bourbon barrels for 12 years. The release was published in October 2017.

name: Ron Zacapa XO
description: Ron Zacapa XO Rum is produced in the highlands of Guatemala where it is distilled from fresh cane juice. The rum is then aged from 6 to 23 years at 7544 feet above sea level at 62 °F (17 °C) using the solera process. The solera aging process incorporates barrels that previously held American whiskeys, sherries, wines and Cognac.

name: Ron Zacapa Royal
description: Old and matured Zacapa, very balanced. Not as fresh as the XO. Elegant and sweet but too expensive.

name: Foursquare 2007 12-Year
description: This single blended rum marked by “X” on label. 12 years old, aged in ex-bourbon casks. The taste is well balanced, with deep, oak and leather notes. It is sweet enough, and fruitiness comes out if you give a time to Mr. 2007.

name: DDL Albion 1994 17 Year Old Full Proof Old Demerara Rum
Berrys’ Finest St. Lucia Rum (Aged 12 Years)
Lemon Hart Original One Hundred British Proof Reserve Rum
LMD Spiced Rum Flavoured Alcohol Beverage

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Gosling's Black Seal 151 Bermuda Rum

name: Old Monk Very Old Vatted Rum (7 Years Old Blended)

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Rhum J.M. White AOC Martinique 50%

name: Pyrat Rum Cask 1623
description: Pyrat Cask 1623 is a special treat with a complex, multi-layered flavor profile. It has a natural citrus taste, is smooth, and has a lingering aroma.

name: Ron Zacapa Centenario 23
description: Ron Zacapa Centenario 23

name: Foursquare 2004 11-Year
description: A rum for rum lovers. Aged for 11 years in bourbon barrels, bottled at cask strength and bursting with flavors and aromas of sun-dried fruit, spice, wood, cocoa.

name: Opthimus 25-Year
description: Oliver & Oliver, the maker of Opthimus, is known for their high-quality rums and this 25-Year rum is no exception. It has a sweet, smooth profile with complex notes of wood, raisins, and fruit. Many users suggest it is very approachable for both beginners and seasoned rum drinkers alike.

name: Facundo Exquisito
description: FACUNDO EXQUISITO is incomparably mellow in profile. The rum itself is a blend of different rums aged between 7 and 23 years in American oak barrels in the Bahamas, finished in sherry casks for about a month or more.

name: Foursquare 2009 12-Year
description: This rum is the latest in the line of Foursquare Exceptional Cask Series. It is a mix of pot and column still rums tropically aged in Barbados for 12 years in ex-bourbon casks. Foursquare is at the very forefront of the “no additives whatsoever” movement so to no one’s surprise this rum contains, you guessed it, no additives.

name: Flor de Caña 25-Year
description: A sugar-free 25-year old, ultra premium rum that is sustainably produced (Carbon Neutral & Fair Trade certified). From a 5th generation family estate, it is naturally aged without artificial ingredients, distilled 100% with renewable energy and KOSHER certified. A full-bodied rum with a long and smooth finish that lingers in the palate. Best enjoyed neat or on a rock, and paired with 70% cocoa chocolate.

name: Foursquare 2010 Detente 10-Year
description: Foursquare 2010 Detente 10-Year is an exceptional rum known for its complexity and smoothness, offering flavors reminiscent of toasted almond and apple skin, with a delightful finish.
